Vehicles.VehicleBuildDef.label: Blériot XI
Vehicles.VehicleBuildDef.description:
A lightweight wood-and-fabric monoplane, famous for completing the first flight across the English Channel in 1909, it helped prove that aircraft could become practical vehicles rather than experimental curiosities.

Being a flying vehicle, it is extremely obvious when on the move.

<color=#bb8f04>Crew:</color> Driver x1
<color=#bb8f04>Fuel type:</color> Chemfuel
